---
title: "Crystal Adote"
description: "Contributor to nycOpenData and NYC Open Data Week 2026"
---

## Project

-   [Leading Causes of Death and Indoor Environmental Complaints](../nyc-open-data-2026/01-Final-Project-Crystal.qmd)

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/crystalna20)\
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/crystal-adote-0305641ba/)\
-   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0006-7777-9798)
